description: Square graphic. The background is a close-up color photograph of hands: a person in blue clothing holding the hands of an older person. Overlaid at top is a navy tab with white italic capitals 'LABOR NEWS'. A bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks reads: 'Department of Labor recovers $844K in back wages, damages for 158 workers illegally deprived of overtime wages by Louisiana home care providers.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom'.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Department of Labor recovers $844K in back wages, damages for 158 workers illegally deprived of overtime wages by Louisiana home care providers / dol.gov/newsroom
